pr.title: Add AGENTS.md for Cursor Cloud development environment
pr.body: ## Summary Adds `AGENTS.md` with Cursor Cloud-specific development instructions for future agents. ## Changes - Created `AGENTS.md` with: - Overview of the app (Next.js 14, Supabase, video clip curation) - Commands to run dev server, build, and TypeScript checks - Required environment variables for Supabase connectivity - Hardcoded login credentials for development testing - Key architecture notes (middleware, session handling, edge runtime) - Note about the video pipeline scripts being separate from the web dashboard ## Verification The development environment was fully set up and verified: - **TypeScript check**: `npx tsc --noEmit` passes cleanly - **Worker check**: `npm run build:worker` passes cleanly - **Next.js build**: `npm run build:frontend` compiles successfully (all 18 routes) - **Dev server**: `npm run dev` starts on port 3000 - **Login UI**: Operator selection and PIN entry flow works end-to-end on the client side [demo_login_flow.mp4](https://cursor.com/agents/bc-e081c45b-4bb3-4871-bfc7-5fb5d394af7b/artifacts?path=%2Fopt%2Fcursor%2Fartifacts%2Fdemo_login_flow.mp4) [Login page operator selection](https://cursor.com/agents/bc-e081c45b-4bb3-4871-bfc7-5fb5d394af7b/artifacts?path=%2Fopt%2Fcursor%2Fartifacts%2Foperator_select.webp) ## Note Full server-side login requires correctly formatted Supabase credentials: - `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL` — must be a URL like `https://.supabase.co` - `SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` — must be a JWT starting with `eyJ...` To show artifacts inline, enable in settings.
pr.author: illest0369
